_comment: Starter QA set. Each entry needs gold_chunk_id once PDFs are ingested; add them after the first ingestion run prints chunk IDs.

qa_pairs.question: Who is the CEO of Tesla?
How is Elon Musk connected to Mars colonization?
qa_pairs.expected_answer: Elon Musk founded SpaceX, whose stated mission includes colonizing Mars.

qa_pairs.question: Which companies has the founder of SpaceX also led?
qa_pairs.expected_answer: Tesla, Neuralink, The Boring Company, X (formerly Twitter).
